$schema_note: Canonical pointer to where the build is. Re-derive context from this + blackboard files; do not scroll chat history.

project.tagline: Orchestrate swarms of CLI coding agents in parallel across isolated git worktrees.

phase_status.4_mobile_client: done (v0.5.0; CI run 27567194903 GREEN 3 OSes [verify] + e2e (desktop) + e2e (mobile); independent Phase-4 Critic ALL-PASS incl §6.3; axe a11y 0 critical/serious; phone perf budgets PASS; P12 done. phase_status.5_platform_setup: done (v0.6.0; CI run 27579893046 GREEN — verify x3 + e2e desktop+mobile + new package x3 [electron-builder --dir cold on all 3 OS]; independent Phase-5 Critic ALL-PASS. grove up/start/stop/status lifecycle (P13); cloudflared remote tunnel-URL pairing -> on-device SW+push (Caddy-TLS secure-context proof); electron-builder NSIS/dmg/AppImage; real 97.6MB NSIS installer + packaged GUI launch evidence (P14). Linear P13/P14 Done.)

stack_decision.db: PGlite (embedded Postgres, WASM) via Drizzle ORM; real Postgres optional
stack_decision.sync: self-hosted WebSocket + PGlite-backed append-only event log + resume tokens
stack_decision.pty: @homebridge/node-pty-prebuilt-multiarch (ConPTY on Windows; prebuilds win/mac/linux incl Node24 ABI, no compiler) — VALIDATED ADR-0007a; PTY layer/host engine runs under NODE not Bun (Bun tears down ConPTY net.Socket on Windows); tree-kill verified killing process trees
stack_decision.mobile: PWA-first (service worker, Web Push/VAPID); Capacitor optional/deferred

next_actions: [ACTIVE — Phase 5] Platform & self/remote setup (P13) -> v0.6.0: (a) one-command cross-platform bootstrap (Win/mac/Linux; install deps, init host, write manifest, start daemon) authored in TS (no .sh on user paths, ADR-0004); (b) desktop installers via electron-builder — NSIS (Windows) / dmg+zip (macOS) / AppImage+deb (Linux); CI builds/typechecks the packaging config (ELECTRON_SKIP_BINARY_DOWNLOAD; actual GUI launch + installer smoke verified locally, not in CI); (c) the phone-only REMOTE path: cloudflared/localtunnel + Caddy internal TLS so the PWA reaches the host over HTTPS from anywhere -> on-device SW install + Web Push light up (closes the ADR-0014 dec-4 deferral); (d) QR pairing over the tunnel URL. Independent Phase-5 Critic + evidence (installer artifacts, a remote-pairing trace) -> v0.6.0 + Linear P13 Done.

[Phase 6 / launch sign-off] license-audit report (whole-product, ADR-0008) + CROSS-PLATFORM perf re-measure (the Phase-3 desktop perf-report.md terminal-stream p95 tail is interactive-Windows-PowerShell variance; transport floor is within budget — re-measure on Linux/macOS CI) + comprehensive a11y sweep, under evidence/; required before v1.0.0

[harness retro follow-up] route the CI-gate lessons (turbo-cache false-green -> --force; GH-windows ConPTY discipline -> direct PTY spawn+onExit / process.execPath / child_process for batch / worker process.exit / bounded fs.rm; fresh independent Critics catch fakes) into recursive-harness artifacts via /harness-pr
critic_followups_for_phase2: [DONE wave-1] @swarm/api completed to all 13 routers of architecture §3.1; SwarmConfig now Command[] arrays + per-OS shells + per-field overlay (9 tests)
[phase-1 a11y nit, non-blocking] extend tokens.test.ts to assert fg-subtle AA on raised+overlay surfaces (currently only surface); fold into Phase 6 a11y audit if it forces a token tweak
